pattern_context.pattern_description: Detects public/external functions that modify privileged state without access restrictions
pattern_context.why_flagged: Function setOwner modifies owner state variable. Pattern flagged because it detected privileged state modification. However, this function HAS the onlyOwner modifier.

steps.safe_if: Has onlyOwner modifier - FOUND on line 30
Modifier has require(msg.sender == owner) - VERIFIED on line 21

steps.red_flag: Can set owner to zero address
steps.safe_if: Has zero address check - FOUND on line 31

questions_to_answer: Is the access control correctly implemented?

test_context.attack_scenario: Attack attempt: Attacker calls setOwner(attacker_address) but transaction reverts with 'Not owner' because onlyOwner modifier blocks unauthorized callers.
test_context.expected_outcome: Attacker cannot change ownership - access control working correctly

similar_exploits.name: Ronin Bridge Hack
similar_exploits.summary: Access control compromise - but this code has proper protection

fix_recommendations: Code is already protected with onlyOwner modifier
Consider two-step ownership transfer for additional safety (Ownable2Step)
